programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: When a beloved mom is murdered in her suburban Connecticut basement, and her husband is found zip-tied to a chair, detectives pursue a camo-clad intruder and a twisted trail of digital evidence that uncovers a diabolical plan, months in the making.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard
programme.desc: A late-night gaming party goes dangerously wrong when a young teenager disappears from the coastal town of Everett, WA.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: They say deaths come in three, but when a young woman falls ill after eerily similar deaths of her father and brother, suspicion turns to a family member and the limits of a mother's love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, a mother must face her demons when her daughter gets left for dead after a vicious murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Rebecca gives up her single life to marry Larry, but after Rebecca comes home and finds Larry in a pool of his own blood, fingers start to point back to her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: After following Laci Peterson's case for more than 15 years, the show delivers a comprehensive report with rarely seen interrogation video, new insight from prosecutors, and surprising details from Amber Frey, who helped uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: After following Laci Peterson's case for more than 15 years, the show delivers a comprehensive report with rarely seen interrogation video, new insight from prosecutors, and surprising details from Amber Frey, who helped uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Michele Lewis' new boyfriend seems almost too good to be true, then she discovers he is a con man harboring dark secrets and embarks on a dangerous mission to expose him.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A mother is found dead in a house fire, but an autopsy reveals a brutal murder; the case goes cold until an unexpected confession sheds new light; Blayne Alexander looks back at a family shattered by loss, but determined to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Two murders in Toronto ignite an investigation that spans four decades, but breakthroughs in investigative genetic genealogy help crack the case; Josh Mankiewicz revisits the mystery that took him to the coldest and most remote place he's ever been.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: Just five days before her elaborate Long Island wedding, a beautiful and brilliant Yale student goes missing; a massive search effort is launched to find her before her wedding day.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A mysterious illness strikes a newly married electrician, and his condition gets increasingly dire as doctors search for answers; it will take a scientific breakthrough to solve this burning mystery and catch a cunning killer.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A romantic anniversary getaway for a couple of high school sweethearts turns disastrous when they become victims of a robbery gone wrong; homicide investigators unravel a lurid secret at the heart of the murder, leading them to a stone-cold killer.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: While a young couple enjoy a romantic honeymoon, a brutal sexual assault and murder occurs; investigators must navigate a web of lies, suspects, and clues to bring a charismatic killer to justice.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A pregnant day care worker is savagely attacked and murdered before her wedding in Mississippi; police must match their wits with a devious killer and untangle a case complicated by a lurid love affair.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Police must unravel a mystery involving an Arizona couple, cross-country romance and a deadly plan.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Halloween becomes a real-life horror story when police discover a beloved mother of four murdered; the panic intensifies as the investigation turns into a case populated by demons, masks and a potential psychopath on the loose.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: On Halloween night a knife-wielding intruder attacks and kills two roommates and leaves another lucky to be alive; although the story is reminiscent to the plot of a horror film, the terror is all too real.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Trick-or-treaters in a small Indiana town have no idea that the sweet grandmother passing out candy is also hiding a deadly secret in her garage.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a massive Halloween bash ends with a young woman's mysterious disappearance, a tiny farming town fears that evil stalks its fields.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Just months after a shooting nearly takes her life, a New Jersey woman is reported missing. Fearing her original attacker has returned to finish the job, investigators race to expose an elaborate murder plot and an obsessive killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a loving father is found dead in the bedroom of his Oklahoma home by his ex-wife, Broken Arrow police must unpack a complex family dynamic and a loyalty based on greed in order to get answers.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Helen's boyfriend goes missing just as authorities find a dismembered torso, but the case may not be closed; 20 years later, Helen's new story could be a game changer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The family of a former soldier questions whether or not his death was a tragic coincidence when they learn of a suspicious detail from his wife's past.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: One of the most notorious citizens of Durham, North Carolina finds herself under scrutiny after her boyfriend is stabbed.

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: When a beloved mom is murdered in her suburban Connecticut basement, and her husband is found zip-tied to a chair, detectives pursue a camo-clad intruder and a twisted trail of digital evidence that uncovers a diabolical plan, months in the making.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a Philly radio personality is killed in her lavish Shore home, the years-long investigation reveals an undercover informant, an intricate murder-for-hire plot, and a vast trafficking conspiracy.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: After a tech millionaire's neighbor is found murdered, he goes on the run and plays a high-stakes game of hide-and-seek with the authorities and the press.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A recent law school graduate in Georgia who has a promising future disappears without a trace.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Co-lead investigator in the Steven Avery case Tom Fassbender discusses the case and allegations investigators coerced Avery's nephew, Brendan Dassey, into making a false confession.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: The discovery of a young woman's body in an abandoned building in rural Texas sparks a multi-state investigation lasting nearly two decades.

programme.title: Manson: The Women
programme.desc: Fifty years after the infamous Manson Family murders, a look at the trail of the women who blindly followed Charles Manson; including new and exclusive interviews.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Pike County Murders: A Family Massacre
programme.desc: Eight family members are executed in one night as detectives must unearth the hidden motive to track down the killers; while the community mourns, investigators analyze bloody footprints to determine which path leads to the truth.

programme.title: The Pike County Murders: A Family Massacre
programme.desc: As investigators zero in on the Wagners, the family starts to feel the heat and begin undercutting each other; a message from Hanna Rhoden reveals a shocking possible motive for the murders.

programme.title: The Pike County Murders: A Family Massacre
programme.desc: At George Wagner's trial, stunning testimony exposes secrets throughout the close-knit community; a motive that caused a family of eight to be murdered in four locations in one night is revealed.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: Investigators uncover a web of lies a decade after a couple's romantic evening atop Rockefeller Lookout in New Jersey ends with the wife's tragic death.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: A Texas woman's apparent suicide devastates the family that she leaves behind, but after one investigator dedicates decades to solving the mystery of what drove her to make such a tragic decision, a far more sinister truth is discovered.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: An elderly woman is found dead in her home outside of Boston after an apparent accidental fall down her stairs, but with the help of a confidential informant, police obtain shocking audio that reveals the truth behind her death.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: Detectives are led down a winding path involving an alleged government conspiracy and a citywide manhunt after a tragic car accident leaves a mother dead and her daughter in critical condition.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When a 41-year-old math teacher suddenly dies at home without an official cause of death, investigators find his new wife holds the clues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: Private investigator and former police officer Taylor Wright vanishes, but detectives think there is more to the story after her girlfriend receives strange text messages from Taylor's phone.

programme.desc: A man becomes the prime suspect in his wife's death after forensic science raises questions about her apparent suicide.

programme.desc: A killer tried to destroy everything which could link them to the crime; but in doing so, they inadvertently created new forensic evidence, evidence which came to light using a technique never before used in a criminal investigation.
